text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day during break, I happen to see Narita Brian speaking with
another student.

text_block_list.name: Friendly Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So, like, I have some friends who're fans of yours too, and we wanna
go to karaoke with you sometime—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm busy. Go ask someone else.

text_block_list.name: Friendly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing that interaction reminds me of when I first met her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's nothing to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Scram.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even now, we don't speak much outside of training. Maybe we'd
understand each other better if we could talk a little more...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No need. You're my trainer—nothing more, nothing less.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Conversation over. Let's start training.
choice_data_list: But I want to know more about you.
But I want to know more about you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What good would that do?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just think about it. Why get involved in other people's lives?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I never expected you to get to know me. You don't need to
understand my motivation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All you need to know is that I want to run. Help me do that, and we're
good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The whole time she's saying this, she's staring off into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to see anyone's fire go out anymore, much less extinguish
it myself. I'm... sick of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her hunger for racing may not be something that can be sated in a
single lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No matter where I go, no matter who I challenge, it's always the same.
I'm left feeling hungrier than before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She must have been suffering this lonesome burden for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's not enough. I need more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her drive will never be satisfied no matter how many opponents she
faces.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian will always have to contend with this unceasing desire in
her heart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's enough. Talking more won't get me anywhere. Let's drop this
pointless discu—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: I'm positive it won't be for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You really...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't expect me to like it, though. I'm still going to do what I want.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Simple as that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, no need to rush... We'll take it slow and build up our rapport
from there.
